summary: Tested Ad Approval Queue for Self-Serve Ad Engine. Fixed critical bug in admin_analytics.py where save_ad_config was called with wrong argument order (db, config, admin_id instead of config, admin_id, db). All 9 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Ads tab shows Overview/Approval Queue/All Variants sub-tabs, queue badge shows pending count (8), Approve/Reject buttons work.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed ads during testing for approval queue verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ad Approval Queue fully working. Admin Console > Ads tab has 3 sub-tabs: Overview (shows Ad Performance, Ad Frequency, Approval Queue Summary), Approval Queue (shows pending ads with Approve/Reject/Edit buttons), All Variants (shows all 15 ad variants with status badges). Queue badge shows pending count. Ad config stored in-memory with file backup at /app/backend/ad_config.json.

POST /api/ads/submit.description: User submits ad for approval, deducts credits from balance

GET /api/ads/my-submissions.description: Returns user's submitted ads with counts by status

DELETE /api/ads/my-submissions/{ad_id}.description: Cancels pending ad and refunds credits

Admin Console Ads Tab UI.description: Shows Overview, Approval Queue, All Variants sub-tabs

Approve/Reject Buttons.description: Visible and functional in Approval Queue

save_ad_config argument order.issue: Called save_ad_config(db, config, admin_id) but function signature is save_ad_config(config, admin_id, db)
